aesthetic: Collaborative Canvas — vibrant multi-color, playful yet professional, component-driven
principles: Multi-color palette: red/purple/blue/green each with clear role
Component thinking: every element is reusable and consistent
Playful but precise: rounded corners + tight grid
promptGuide: Apply this aesthetic: Bricolage Grotesque display, Plus Jakarta Sans body, white bg, near-black #1e1e1e text, use brand colors purposefully (red for primary CTA, purple for creative/design, blue for tech, green for success), 8px border-radius, consistent spacing grid (8px base), collaborative tone ('design together', 'shared workspace'), component-like card layouts with clear visual hierarchy.
